LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF UNIFUND CCR, LLC A LIMITED LIABILITY CO'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION. DEFENDANT'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED IN PART. THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE THE $444.16 THAT IT IS CURRENTLY HOLDING AND ANY OTHER FUNDS TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR. $200 PER PAY PERIOD ($400/MONTH) SHALL BE WITHHELD FROM THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S EARNINGS FOR THE BENEFIT OF THE CREDITOR AND TO SERVICE THIS DEBT. ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/JMQ)

calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Aug-31-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF UNIFUND CCR, LLC A LIMITED LIABILITY CO'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION

Defendant's claim of exemption is granted in part. The levying officer is directed to release the $444.16 that it is currently holding and any other funds to the judgment creditor. $200 per pay period ($400/month) shall be withheld from the judgment debtor's earnings for the benefit of the creditor and to service this debt.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
